programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Snack on the yummiest Spongebob hits featuring Krabby Patties!

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Girl From Poughkeepsie
programme.desc: Ross struggles to maintain a long-distance relationship; Chandler's well-intended attempts to get Rachel a date seem to miss the mark; Monica's plan to assert some authority at her new restaurant goes awry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's brother (Giovanni Ribisi) asks her to carry a baby for him and his wife; Chandler gets lessons in love; Joey finds himself in a class struggle.

programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy build a blanket fort -- and come to a crossroads in their relationship; Wolowitz meets a half-brother he didn't know he had; Leonard and Penny have an argument during an appearance on Wil Wheaton's podcast.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler has a hard time handling Kathy's new role in a play, in which she pretends to have sex with a handsome man.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Rugby
programme.desc: Chandler runs into Janice, now divorced, and finds her more irritating than ever; Ross plays rugby to impress Emily; Monica tries to figure out what a mysterious electrical switch in her new apartment does.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel throws Emily a phony going-away party so she can see Joshua outside of work, and pregnant Phoebe craves meat.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Free Porn
programme.desc: Ross tells Emily (Helen Baxendale) how he feels about her; Chandler and Joey suddenly receive a free adult TV channel in their apartment; Phoebe gets some surprising news about her pregnancy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachel's New Dress
programme.desc: Ross has concerns about Emily's interests; Rachel's plans for Joshua are upset by a late change of venue.

programme.title: Friends

programme.desc: Ross tries to keep Emily from returning to London; Monica and Rachel attempt to win back their apartment.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!"; Patrick crushes the mailman, so he and SpongeBob deliver the mail around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Dopey Dick; Plankton and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Squidward joins a crew of sailors hunting down the great white jellyfish; Plankton finds a magic bean that takes him to a land of giants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob befriends a sentient Krabby Patty whose only wish is to be eaten; Rube hosts an episode of "FUN-Believable! With Rube" where he explores little known oddities and attractions around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Spatula of the Heavens; Gary's Playhouse

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Chatterbox Gary; Don't Feed the Clowns

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty; when Mr. Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Inappropriate Sister

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Air Rescue: Pups Stop a Rocket-Powered Pogo Stick; Air Rescue: Pups Save the Sky-High Stunt Show
programme.desc: Danny's rocket-boosted pogo stick accidentally causes a fire; it's up to the entire Air Rescue team to save Danny and stop the forest from going up in flames; when Francois' big stunt show goes horribly awry, the Air Rescue pups are on a roll.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Copycat
programme.desc: The Mighty Pups get charged up to take on new superbaddie the Copycat; it will take all-new powers and gear to take down their most formidable foe to date.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger transforms his robot cat Meow-Meow into a tiger-sized metal-eating menace, the PAW Patrol calls in the Cat Pack for help with stopping the creature.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Chicken Tulip; Pups Stop an Xtreme Shark
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger and his mother help Mayor Goodway look for a rare tulip, Humdinger gets them all in trouble; the pups must save Daring Danny X when a mechanical shark stunt goes awry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Houseboat; The Crew Builds a Spa
programme.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and his best friend Daisy cheerfully navigate life with boundless enthusiasm and comical misunderstandings due to his instinctive crocodile logic.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Water Walker; Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Windsurfer

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Rocket Rescuers; Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: The Golden Lion Mask
programme.desc: Cat-Pack members Wild and Shade team up with the Mighty Pups to stop a runaway rocket; when the Ruff-Ruff Pack swipes a priceless golden lion mask from the museum, Shade and Wild must help the PAW Patrol to retrieve the stolen artifact.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Giant Dam; The Crew Builds a Squirrel-Proof Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town; Rubble and Motor come up with crafty construction solutions to fix Farmer Zoe's squirrel problem before the Farm Fair.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.sub-title: Tooth on the Loose; Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy; Mr. Crocodile, Daisy, and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: The Cat That Roared; Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Saving the Safe

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Resolutions
programme.desc: Ross vows to try something new; Joey resolves to learn guitar from Phoebe; Rachel gives up gossiping.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler's Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is put off by the laugh Chandler uses to impress his boss (Sam McMurray); Ross shocks everyone by dating Janice (Maggie Wheeler).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe meets her estranged father (Bob Balaban) at her grandmother's funeral; Joey's fondness for an expensive bag loses him an audition; Chandler tells perfectionist Monica that she is useless at massage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Chandler gets nervous when everyone learns about Monica; Joey's new girlfriend gets physical; Ross moves into a new apartment but fails to impress his new neighbors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe finds a police officer's badge and goes on a spree of arrests until she meets up with the owner; Joey thinks he's in love with Monica; Ross buys a couch but won't pay to have it delivered.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
